source.title: How do I claim my Faction Fleet rewards?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How do I claim my Faction Fleet rewards?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Claiming your earned ATLAS from Faction Fleet (SCORE) is quick and easy.
How to Claim Your Rewards:
Go to the Faction Fleet page:https://play.staratlas.com/fleet/
Find your enlisted fleet and click on “Claim ATLAS” for the fleet you want to claim rewards from
Approve the transaction in your wallet.
Once confirmed, your ATLAS rewards are automatically sent to your wallet.

claims.text: Claiming your earned ATLAS from Faction Fleet (SCORE) is quick and easy.
